User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user account in the HealthLinke application. This entity stores core user information but excludes sensitive authentication data like passwords, relying on an external authentication system.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

firstName.description: The first name of the user.

lastName.description: The last name of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user, used for communication.

phone.description: The primary phone number of the user.

profileImageUrl.description: URL to the user's profile picture.

preferredLanguage.description: The user's preferred language for the application interface (e.g., 'en' for English, 'hi' for Hindi).

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last update to the user account details.

PatientProfile.title: PatientProfile
PatientProfile.description: Stores detailed health-related information for a specific user, acting as their primary health record.

id.description: Unique identifier for the PatientProfile entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User account associated with this patient profile. (Relationship: User 1:N PatientProfile)

medicalConditions.description: A list of medical conditions or chronic diseases the patient has.

allergies.description: A list of known allergies the patient has.

currentMedications.description: A list of medications the patient is currently taking.

emergencyContactName.description: The name of an emergency contact person for the patient.

emergencyContactPhone.description: The phone number of the emergency contact person.

FamilyMember.title: FamilyMember
FamilyMember.description: Allows a primary patient profile to manage health records for other family members.

id.description: Unique identifier for the FamilyMember entity.

patientProfileId.description: Reference to the primary PatientProfile managing this family member's record. (Relationship: PatientProfile 1:N FamilyMember)

firstName.description: The first name of the family member.

lastName.description: The last name of the family member.

relationship.description: The relationship of the family member to the primary patient (e.g., 'spouse', 'child', 'parent').

dateOfBirth.description: The family member's date of birth.

gender.description: The gender of the family member.

medicalConditions.description: A list of medical conditions or chronic diseases the family member has.

allergies.description: A list of known allergies the family member has.

Doctor.title: Doctor
Doctor.description: Contains detailed profiles for doctors available for consultation on the platform.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Doctor entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User account associated with this doctor profile, if doctors also have user accounts. (Relationship: User 1:N Doctor)

firstName.description: The first name of the doctor.

lastName.description: The last name of the doctor.

profileImageUrl.description: URL to the doctor's profile picture.

degree.description: The highest medical degree obtained by the doctor (e.g., 'MBBS', 'MD').

specialization.description: The doctor's primary area of medical specialization (e.g., 'Cardiologist', 'Pediatrician').

experienceYears.description: The number of years of experience the doctor has.

consultationFees.description: The standard consultation fees charged by the doctor.

about.description: A brief biography or description of the doctor's practice.

clinicAddress.description: The physical address of the doctor's clinic or primary practice location.

isVerified.description: Indicates if the doctor's credentials and profile have been verified by the platform.

consultationTypes.description: A list of consultation types offered by the doctor (e.g., 'chat', 'audio', 'video').

averageRating.description: The average rating received by the doctor from patients.

totalRatings.description: The total number of ratings submitted for the doctor.

MedicineCategory.title: MedicineCategory
MedicineCategory.description: Organizes medicines into logical categories for browsing in the online store.

id.description: Unique identifier for the MedicineCategory entity.

name.description: The name of the medicine category (e.g., 'Tablets', 'Syrup', 'Ayurvedic').

description.description: A brief description of the medicine category.

Medicine.title: Medicine
Medicine.description: Details about individual medicines available for purchase in the online store.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Medicine entity.

name.description: The brand name or common name of the medicine.

description.description: A detailed description of the medicine, including its uses and composition.

categoryId.description: Reference to the category this medicine belongs to. (Relationship: MedicineCategory 1:N Medicine)

price.description: The standard selling price of the medicine.

discountPercentage.description: The percentage discount applied to the medicine, if any.

imageUrl.description: URL to an image of the medicine.

isPrescriptionRequired.description: Indicates if a prescription is mandatory to purchase this medicine.

genericAlternativeMedicineIds.description: References to other Medicine entities that are generic alternatives to this medicine. (Relationship: Medicine N:N Medicine)

manufacturer.description: The pharmaceutical manufacturer of the medicine.

Prescription.title: Prescription
Prescription.description: Stores details of prescriptions uploaded by users, including images and refill reminders.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Prescription entity.

patientProfileId.description: Reference to the PatientProfile who uploaded this prescription. (Relationship: PatientProfile 1:N Prescription)

uploadDate.description: The date and time when the prescription was uploaded.

imageUrl.description: URL to the image of the prescription document.

voiceNoteUrl.description: URL to an uploaded voice note containing prescription details.

notes.description: Any additional notes or instructions related to the prescription.

status.description: The current status of the prescription (e.g., 'pending review', 'approved', 'rejected').

issuedByDoctorId.description: Reference to the Doctor who issued this prescription, if known. (Relationship: Doctor 1:N Prescription)

refillReminderDate.description: The date when a refill reminder should be sent to the patient.

DoctorConsultation.title: DoctorConsultation
DoctorConsultation.description: Records details of a booked or completed doctor consultation, including type, time, and fees.

id.description: Unique identifier for the DoctorConsultation entity.

patientProfileId.description: Reference to the PatientProfile participating in the consultation. (Relationship: PatientProfile 1:N DoctorConsultation)

doctorId.description: Reference to the Doctor providing the consultation. (Relationship: Doctor 1:N DoctorConsultation)

consultationTimeSlot.description: The specific time slot booked for the consultation (e.g., '10:00-10:30').

status.description: The current status of the consultation (e.g., 'booked', 'ongoing', 'completed', 'cancelled').

feesPaid.description: The fees paid for this consultation.

followUpStatus.description: Indicates the status of a follow-up (e.g., 'none', 'scheduled', 'completed').

followUpFees.description: Fees for a follow-up consultation, if applicable.

consultationLink.description: URL for joining a video or audio call consultation.

DoctorNote.title: DoctorNote
DoctorNote.description: Captures notes made by a doctor during or after a consultation for a patient's health record.

id.description: Unique identifier for the DoctorNote entity.

consultationId.description: Reference to the specific DoctorConsultation this note belongs to. (Relationship: DoctorConsultation 1:N DoctorNote)

doctorId.description: Reference to the Doctor who created this note. (Relationship: Doctor 1:N DoctorNote)

patientProfileId.description: Reference to the PatientProfile this note is about. (Relationship: PatientProfile 1:N DoctorNote)

noteContent.description: The actual content of the doctor's notes.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the doctor's note was created.

LabTestCategory.title: LabTestCategory
LabTestCategory.description: Organizes lab tests into categories for easier browsing and selection.

id.description: Unique identifier for the LabTestCategory entity.

name.description: The name of the lab test category (e.g., 'Blood Test', 'Sugar Test', 'Full Body Checkup').

description.description: A brief description of the lab test category.

LabTest.title: LabTest
LabTest.description: Defines individual lab tests available for booking, including their details and requirements.

id.description: Unique identifier for the LabTest entity.

name.description: The name of the lab test (e.g., 'Complete Blood Count', 'Fasting Blood Sugar').

description.description: A detailed description of the lab test and what it measures.

categoryId.description: Reference to the category this lab test belongs to. (Relationship: LabTestCategory 1:N LabTest)

price.description: The cost of the lab test.

homeSampleCollectionAvailable.description: Indicates if home sample collection is an option for this test.

preparationInstructions.description: Instructions for the patient to prepare for the test (e.g., fasting requirements).

LabTestBooking.title: LabTestBooking
LabTestBooking.description: Records the details of a patient's booking for one or more lab tests, including collection and report information.

id.description: Unique identifier for the LabTestBooking entity.

patientProfileId.description: Reference to the PatientProfile who made the booking. (Relationship: PatientProfile 1:N LabTestBooking)

labTestIds.description: References to the LabTest entities included in this booking. (Relationship: LabTest N:N LabTestBooking)

bookingDate.description: The date when the lab test booking was made.

sampleCollectionDate.description: The scheduled date for sample collection.

sampleCollectionTimeSlot.description: The scheduled time slot for sample collection.

collectionAddress.description: The address where the sample is to be collected (for home collection).

status.description: The current status of the lab test booking (e.g., 'booked', 'sample_collected', 'processing', 'report_ready', 'cancelled').

totalFees.description: The total amount charged for all tests in this booking.

paymentStatus.description: The payment status for the booking (e.g., 'pending', 'paid', 'failed').

reportDownloadUrl.description: URL to download the test report in PDF format once ready.

isHomeCollection.description: Indicates if the booking is for home sample collection.

Order.title: Order
Order.description: Represents a customer order placed through the online medicine store.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Order entity.

patientProfileId.description: Reference to the PatientProfile who placed the order. (Relationship: PatientProfile 1:N Order)

orderDate.description: The date and time when the order was placed.

totalAmount.description: The total monetary amount of the order after discounts and taxes.

discountAmount.description: The total discount applied to the order.

deliveryAddress.description: The full delivery address for the order.

paymentMethod.description: The payment method used for the order (e.g., 'COD' for Cash on Delivery, 'online').

paymentStatus.description: The current payment status of the order (e.g., 'pending', 'paid', 'failed').

orderStatus.description: The current fulfillment status of the order (e.g., 'pending', 'confirmed', 'processing', 'shipped', 'out_for_delivery', 'delivered', 'cancelled').

trackingNumber.description: A unique number for tracking the delivery of the order.

prescriptionId.description: Reference to the Prescription entity required for this order, if any. (Relationship: Prescription 1:N Order)

OrderItem.title: OrderItem
OrderItem.description: Details individual items included within a specific customer order.

id.description: Unique identifier for the OrderItem entity.

orderId.description: Reference to the Order this item belongs to. (Relationship: Order 1:N OrderItem)

medicineId.description: Reference to the Medicine entity being ordered. (Relationship: Medicine 1:N OrderItem)

quantity.description: The quantity of the medicine ordered.

unitPriceAtTimeOfOrder.description: The unit price of the medicine at the time the order was placed.

itemDiscountAtTimeOfOrder.description: The discount applied to this specific item at the time of order.

HealthTip.title: HealthTip
HealthTip.description: Stores daily health tips and wellness advice for users.

id.description: Unique identifier for the HealthTip entity.

title.description: The title of the health tip.

content.description: The full content or text of the health tip.

imageUrl.description: URL to an image associated with the health tip.

publishDate.description: The date when the health tip was published or made active.

tags.description: Keywords or tags to categorize the health tip (e.g., 'diet', 'exercise', 'mental health').

Hospital.title: Hospital
Hospital.description: Information about hospitals, primarily for emergency services (nearest hospital feature).

id.description: Unique identifier for the Hospital entity.

address.description: The full postal address of the hospital.

latitude.description: The geographical latitude coordinate of the hospital.

longitude.description: The geographical longitude coordinate of the hospital.

phoneNumber.description: The primary contact phone number for the hospital.

WellnessResource.title: WellnessResource
WellnessResource.description: Content for the wellness section, including videos, diet plans, and guides.

id.description: Unique identifier for the WellnessResource entity.

title.description: The title of the wellness resource (e.g., 'Yoga for Beginners', 'Mediterranean Diet Plan').

description.description: A brief description of what the resource offers.

category.description: The category of the wellness resource (e.g., 'Yoga videos', 'Diet plans', 'Pregnancy care', 'Mental health tips', 'Old age care guide').

contentUrl.description: URL where the actual content (video, article, PDF) can be accessed.

imageUrl.description: URL to a thumbnail or preview image for the resource.

tags.description: Keywords or tags to further categorize the wellness resource.

Offer.title: Offer
Offer.description: Manages promotional offers and coupons for medicines and services.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Offer entity.

code.description: The promotional code that users can apply (e.g., 'SAVE10').

name.description: A short, user-friendly name for the offer.

description.description: A detailed description of the offer, including terms and conditions.

discountPercentage.description: The percentage discount offered (e.g., 10 for 10% off).

minOrderAmount.description: The minimum order amount required to apply the offer, if applicable.

startDate.description: The date and time when the offer becomes active.

endDate.description: The date and time when the offer expires.

isActive.description: Indicates if the offer is currently active and can be used.

appliesToEntityType.description: Specifies what the offer applies to (e.g., 'all', 'Medicine', 'MedicineCategory').

appliesToEntityIds.description: References to specific Medicine or MedicineCategory entities this offer applies to, if not 'all'.

maxUsageCount.description: The maximum number of times this offer can be used in total or per user.

Referral.title: Referral
Referral.description: Tracks the details of user referrals and associated rewards.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Referral entity.

referrerUserId.description: Reference to the User who made the referral. (Relationship: User 1:N Referral)

referredUserId.description: Reference to the User who was referred, once they sign up. (Relationship: User 1:N Referral)

referralCodeUsed.description: The specific referral code used for this referral.

referralDate.description: The date and time when the referral event (e.g., signup) occurred.

status.description: The current status of the referral (e.g., 'pending', 'earned', 'paid_out').

rewardAmount.description: The monetary value of the reward associated with this referral.

definition.description: Stores core user profile information. Access is restricted to the user whose ID matches the document ID. This serves as the root for all user-specific private data.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user, matching `request.auth.uid`.

definition.description: Stores the primary health profile for a user. The document ID is 'patientProfile'. The `userId` field within the document must match the parent `userId` from the path, ensuring direct ownership. This enables simple, atomic security rules.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user who owns this patient profile.

definition.description: Contains health records for family members managed by the primary patient. Includes denormalized `ownerUserId` (the `userId` from the path) for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user who owns the primary patient profile managing this family member.

params.name: familyMemberId
params.description: The unique ID of the family member's record.

definition.description: Stores public profiles for doctors. Publicly readable for all authenticated users for discovery. Write access is restricted to the doctor whose `userId` field matches the `request.auth.uid`. Includes denormalized `userId` for authorization independence.

params.name: doctorId
params.description: The unique ID of the doctor.

definition.description: Stores categories for medicines. Publicly readable for all authenticated users. Admin write access.

params.name: categoryId
params.description: The unique ID of the medicine category.

definition.description: Stores details about individual medicines. Publicly readable for all authenticated users. Admin write access.

params.name: medicineId
params.description: The unique ID of the medicine.

definition.description: Stores uploaded prescriptions for a patient. Includes denormalized `ownerUserId` (the `userId` from the path) for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user who owns this prescription.

params.name: prescriptionId
params.description: The unique ID of the prescription.

definition.description: Records doctor consultations. Includes denormalized `patientUserId` and `doctorUserId` for authorization independence, allowing both the patient and the doctor involved to access the record directly. QAP-compliant for listing.

params.name: consultationId
params.description: The unique ID of the doctor consultation.

definition.description: Stores notes made by a doctor during or after a consultation. Includes denormalized `consultationPatientUserId` and `consultationDoctorUserId` from the parent consultation for authorization independence.

params.name: consultationId
params.description: The unique ID of the parent doctor consultation.

params.name: noteId
params.description: The unique ID of the doctor's note.

definition.description: Stores categories for lab tests. Publicly readable for all authenticated users. Admin write access.

params.name: categoryId
params.description: The unique ID of the lab test category.

definition.description: Defines individual lab tests. Publicly readable for all authenticated users. Admin write access.

params.name: labTestId
params.description: The unique ID of the lab test.

definition.description: Records patient bookings for lab tests. Includes denormalized `ownerUserId` (the `userId` from the path) for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user who owns this lab test booking.

params.name: bookingId
params.description: The unique ID of the lab test booking.

definition.description: Represents a customer order. Includes denormalized `ownerUserId` (the `userId` from the path) for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user who placed this order.

params.name: orderId
params.description: The unique ID of the order.

definition.description: Details individual items within an order. Includes denormalized `orderOwnerUserId` (the `userId` from the parent order's path) for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user who owns the parent order.

params.name: orderId
params.description: The unique ID of the parent order.

params.name: orderItemId
params.description: The unique ID of the order item.

definition.description: Stores daily health tips. Publicly readable for all authenticated users. Admin write access.

params.name: tipId
params.description: The unique ID of the health tip.

definition.description: Information about hospitals. Publicly readable for all authenticated users (or unauthenticated for emergency). Admin write access.

params.name: hospitalId
params.description: The unique ID of the hospital.

definition.description: Stores wellness content like videos and diet plans. Publicly readable for all authenticated users. Admin write access.

params.name: resourceId
params.description: The unique ID of the wellness resource.

definition.description: Manages promotional offers and coupons. Publicly readable for all authenticated users. Admin write access.

params.name: offerId
params.description: The unique ID of the offer.

definition.description: Tracks user referrals. Includes denormalized `referrerUserId` (from the path, as owner) and `referredUserId` for authorization independence, allowing both parties to access the record.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user who is either the referrer or referred party in this referral chain.

params.name: referralId
params.description: The unique ID of the referral event.

definition.description: A collection used for Database Access Control (DBAC). The existence of a document at this path signifies that the `userId` is an administrator. No sensitive user data is stored here, only a pointer for role verification.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user who has been assigned the 'admin' role.

definition.description: A collection used for Database Access Control (DBAC). The existence of a document at this path signifies that the `userId` is a doctor. This allows for role-based access checks, e.g., for updating doctor profiles or creating doctor notes.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user who has been assigned the 'doctor' role.

firestore.reasoning:
The Firestore structure prioritizes robust security, scalability, and debuggability by strictly adhering to Authorization Independence and Structural Segregation principles. User-specific private data is deeply nested under `/users/{userId}/...` to leverage path-based security, making `request.auth.uid` checks straightforward and efficient. Publicly accessible application data (e.g., Doctors, Medicines, Categories, Health Tips, Hospitals, Wellness Resources, Offers) resides in top-level collections, allowing for simple 'allow read: if request.auth.uid != null;' or even 'allow read: true;' rules if fully public.

Authorization Independence is achieved primarily through **denormalization**. For any subcollection whose access depends on a parent's ownership or membership, the relevant `userId` (or `member` map) is copied directly into the child document. For example:
- `PatientProfile` is stored at `/users/{userId}/patientProfile`. The `userId` in the document implicitly matches the `userId` in the path, making ownership explicit.
- `FamilyMember`, `Prescription`, `LabTestBooking`, and `Order` documents, which are subcollections of a user's `patientProfile`, will include an `ownerUserId` field. This `ownerUserId` will always be the `userId` from the parent path, allowing direct authorization checks on the document itself (`resource.data.ownerUserId == request.auth.uid`) without needing to perform a `get()` operation on the parent `PatientProfile` or `User` document.
- `DoctorConsultation` documents, which involve both a patient and a doctor, will denormalize `patientUserId` and `doctorUserId` fields. This enables independent checks for both parties (`request.auth.uid == resource.data.patientUserId || request.auth.uid == resource.data.doctorUserId`), allowing each party to access their relevant consultations without needing to traverse relationships.
- `DoctorNote` documents, nested under `DoctorConsultation`, will denormalize `consultationPatientUserId` and `consultationDoctorUserId` from their parent, ensuring access can be granted to both the patient and the doctor involved in that consultation.
- `OrderItem` documents will denormalize `orderOwnerUserId` from their parent `Order` for similar reasons.
- `Referral` documents will include both `referrerUserId` and `referredUserId` for direct access control by either involved user.

This denormalization strategy is critical for enabling **QAP-compliant (Query as Authorization Predicate) `list` operations**. For private, user-owned data, queries will naturally be scoped by the `userId` in the path (e.g., `db.collection('users').doc(auth.uid).collection('prescriptions')`). For shared collections like `/doctorConsultations`, clients *must* include `where('patientUserId', '==', request.auth.uid)` or `where('doctorUserId', '==', request.auth.uid)` in their queries. Security rules can then enforce that any `list` operation on `/doctorConsultations` must contain one of these filters, preventing unauthorized broad fetches. Public collections like `/medicines` support open `list` operations as they are designed for general browsing. This structure minimizes complex `get()` calls in security rules, significantly improving performance, maintainability, and debuggability while ensuring data integrity and strict access control.
